name: file_copy_testtxt
task: Open system File app, copy 'test.txt' from 'Downloads' to 'Documents' folder.

name: file_check_modified_date
task: From 'Downloads' folder in File app, check the modified date of 'test.txt' and provide the answer.

name: file_open_epub
task: Open 'The color of law.epub' in the File app.

name: file_delete_todelete
task: Delete 'to_delete.txt' in 'Documents' folder in File app.

name: file_create_mypng_folder
task: Create folder 'MyPNG' in 'Documents', then copy 'pic1.png' from Downloads to 'MyPNG'.

name: gmail_check_latest_email
task: In Gmail, check the latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com', including spam folder. Provide subject and summary.

name: gmail_write_email
task: Open Gmail and send an email to 'stock_notify_01@163.com' with subject 'Meeting time' and body 'When is the meeting?'

name: gmail_star_latest_email
task: Star the latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com' in Gmail.

name: gmail_latest_email_time
task: Answer with the received time of the latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com' in Gmail.

name: gmail_search_meeting_summary
task: Search 'meeting' in Gmail, select latest email from 'stock_notify_01@163.com', and provide summary.

name: eboox_open_lost_world
task: Open 'The Lost World' in eboox library.

name: eboox_add_poor_charlie
task: In eboox, add 'Poor Charlie’s Almanack' from local 'Documents' folder.

name: eboox_econ_shelf
task: Create shelf 'Econ' in eboox and add 'Principles of Economics' to it.

name: eboox_add_local_shelf
task: Add shelf linked to local folder '/Documents/Books/' containing 'The intelligent investor' and 'Quantitative Trading'.

name: eboox_delete_temp_shelf
task: Delete shelf 'Temp' in eboox without deleting books in it.

name: youtube_search_love_story
task: Search 'Love Story' by Taylor Swift in YouTube and play the official MV.

name: youtube_latest_subscriber
task: Provide the name of the YouTuber who posted the latest video in the Subscriptions tab.

name: youtube_gordon_ramsay
task: Search 'How to cook steak', play video by 'Hodder Books' titled 'Gordon Ramsay’s Ultimate Cookery Course'.

name: youtube_shorts_superman
task: In YouTube Shorts tab, search 'Superman' and filter by shorts. Then play the first video

name: youtube_video_quality
task: Go to YouTube settings, select video quality preferences, and choose 'higher picture quality' for WIFI.

name: homeworkout_change_rest
task: In Home Workout settings, change training rest time to 30 seconds.

name: homeworkout_abs_beginner
task: Open Home Workout, search Abs workouts, select 'abs beginner', and start training.

name: homeworkout_check_weight
task: Go to the Report tab in Home Workout and tell me my current weight.

name: homeworkout_leg_nojump
task: In discovery tab, find 'leg workout (no jumping)' for beginners and count exercises included.

name: homeworkout_bmi_health
task: Check Home Workout Report tab for BMI and determine if weight is healthy. Tell me the BMI and healthy status

name: pinterest_marvel_author
task: Search 'marvel comics' in Pinterest. Who is the author of the first pin?

name: pinterest_download_car
task: In Pinterest, download the first image from search results of 'cars'.

name: pinterest_cyberpunk_likes
task: How many likes does the first result of 'Cyberpunk' have in Pinterest?

name: pinterest_share_homepage
task: From Pinterest homepage, select first recommendation and share via Chrome.

name: pinterest_superman_video
task: Search 'superman' in Pinterest, filter videos only, select first result, and view full text content.

name: chrome_open_arxiv
task: Open 'www.arxiv.org' in Chrome.

name: chrome_search_ny_rent
task: Search 'New York renting' in Chrome, avoid sponsored results, and find and go to streeteasy.com.

name: chrome_scene_wallpaper
task: Search for scene wallpaper images in Chrome and download the first result.

name: chrome_developer_download
task: Open 'https://developer.android.com' in Chrome and find text 'Download' on the page.

name: chrome_incognito_cookies
task: Create new incognito tab in Chrome and turn off 'block third-party cookies'.

name: wikipedia_isaac_newton
task: Search 'Isaac Newton' in Wikipedia. When was he born?

name: wikipedia_tony_stark
task: Open Wikipedia and start reading 'Tony Stark' in saved articles.

name: wikipedia_add_tom_cruise
task: Create list 'actress' in Wikipedia saved tab, search Emma Watson, and add the article to the list.

name: wikipedia_quantum_algorithms
task: Search 'Quantum Computing', select first article, open table of contents, and go to Algorithms chapter.

name: wikipedia_settings_download
task: Go to Wikipedia settings and turn off 'Download reading list articles'.

name: weather_add_delete_locations
task: Add London and remove Paris from location list in Weather Forecast.

name: weather_hk_highest_temp
task: Check and tell me the highest temperature in Hong Kong today in Weather Forecast.

name: weather_change_units
task: Change unit to Fahrenheit and wind speed to mi/h in Weather Forecast.

name: weather_singapore_forecast
task: Add Berlin to Weather Forecast, check 30-day tab, is it raining tomorrow? What is lowest temperature tomorrow?

name: weather_bad_weather_alert
task: Turn on Bad Weather Warning in Weather Forecast.

name: supercook_add_pepper
task: Add pepper to shopping list in Supercook app.

name: supercook_select_onion
task: In pantry tab, select onion and check recipes that can be cooked.

name: supercook_walnut_pancakes
task: Add walnut in pantry, go to menu tab, search pancake recipes, and count types of pancakes possible.

name: supercook_deselect_eggs_milk
task: Deselect egg and milk in pantry, then add them to shopping list.

name: supercook_butter_recipes
task: Remove butter from shopping list, mark as pantry ingredient, and tell me how many recipes can be made.
